text:
In the quiet town of Whisperbrook lived Cleopatra Butterfly. She fluttered happily among blossoms. One day she heard stories told by bees about somewhere far fantastical. Maybe dragons? She decided to fly.

With bold wings, she lifted higher. The night air chilled her. Soon stars twinkled. There!

She perched on a gemstone. A fairy flicked her antenna. "That's Fairyland?"

"That's me." She laughed. Lovely creatures peered.

There was Luna. She changed hues.

There was Orion. His gaze twinkled.

There was Orion's wife, Minerva.

Hours passed. Stories unfolded.

One saw an owl wise.

Another saw dreams soar.

She loved. Loved a hawk.

Together, they dreamed.

At dawn. Home.










One.




Stay.



Just one.



How sweet.




She wished him forever. Lost herself.

That's how magic felt.







I love butterflies.

They live forever.




Maybe.




Oh yeah.



Just believe.




I
